title: Anchor Compliance Requirements
summary: Legal-surface, consent, sub-processor, and GDPR data-subject-rights requirements Anchor must ship for its German B2C subscription before non-pilot launch.
notes: Strong PRD signals: Purpose, in/out-of-scope sections, and numbered product requirements CR-001..CR-011 stating what the product must ship from a user/legal/business perspective. Path is requirements directory. Mechanics reference ADRs but the doc itself is requirement-level, not a decision record (it states it is the requirement-level expression of ADR-0021). Filename suffix is a stable path-unique token, not a SHA-256 hash, because no code-execution tool (python/ctx_execute) was available in this environment to compute one; the slug compliance-requirements is globally unique in the tree so there is no sibling collision.
